Human Resources Manager | Hiring Multiple Roles

🚀We Are Hiring Freelancers | Multiple Roles
At Nextloop Technologies, we are expanding our project teams and looking for talented freelancers to join us on exciting engagements with global clients. If you’re passionate about IT consulting and want to work on high-impact projects, explore our current openings below:

Nextloop Technologies is a leading provider of digital transformation services, specializing in Staff augmentation, customs of software developers and AI and Blockchain solutions, enterprise software development, SAP consulting, cloud solutions, data analytics. We partner with global enterprises to deliver innovative and scalable solutions.

💡Requirements:
We are seeking a highly skilled Full Stack AI Developer to join our project team at Nextloop Technologies. The freelancer will be responsible for delivering high- quality solutions aligned with client need.

❇️Skill- Set Required:
· Strong expertise in .NET 8 / C# Backend Development 
· Hands-on experience with React & TypeScript 
· Familiarity with AI/ML & LLM Integration 
· Additional knowledge of Event-Driven Architecture & Workflows 

📌Location: Remote
 
 ⌛Tenure for project:
 Project Duration – 3 months Contract
 Extensions possible based on performance and project needs.
 
🧾Experience:
5+ years of relevant professional experience in Full Stack Development (.NET, React) and AI/ML integration with proven track record of successful project delivery.
 
 ✔️Required:
 · Strong expertise in .NET 8 / C# Backend Development and AI/ML Integration 
· Hands-on experience with React & TypeScript Frontend Development and Workflow Automation (Camunda, SignalR) 
· Familiarity with SQL Server, Entity Framework Core, and Event-Driven Architectures (Azure Service Bus, Kafka) 
· Additional knowledge of Docker, Kubernetes (AKS), and CI/CD Pipelines (Azure DevOps/GitHub Actions)
 
 
Why Join Us?
Collaborate on prestigious projects with global enterprises.
Flexible freelance opportunities across diverse technologies.
Exposure to cutting-edge IT solutions and digital transformation.
Competitive compensation and professional growth.

📩How to Apply :
Send your updated resume to hr@nextlooptechnologies.com with the subject line Application – Full Stack AI Developer | Nextloop Technologies.

Most Urgent Position C2C...

Role : AI/ML Engineering
 Location : 100% Remote
 Position Type : Long Term Contract

 Job Description :
 The Engineering AI/ML Manager (GL 28) is a hands-on technical leader responsible for delivering AI/ML solutions from design through production while managing a small team of engineers. This role balances people leadership, technical depth, and delivery accountability, and is ideal for a manager who still codes, reviews designs, and actively guides implementation.
This role supports enterprise AI initiatives across machine learning, generative AI, LLM based solutions, and data driven automation, aligned with healthcare and regulated industry standards.

Key Responsibilities
Technical Leadership & Delivery
• Lead the design, development, and deployment of AI/ML solutions in production environments.
• Guide architecture decisions for ML pipelines, model deployment, and inference at scale.
• Review and approve technical designs, code, and model implementation approaches.
• Ensure solutions meet security, reliability, scalability, and responsible AI standards.
• Partner with architects and platform teams on cloud-based AI implementations (Azure preferred).People & Team Management
• Manage and mentor a team of AI/ML engineers (onshore and offshore).
• Support sprint planning, backlog prioritization, and delivery commitments.
• Conduct performance coaching, skill development, and technical mentoring.
• Foster strong collaboration across engineering, data, product, and business teams.
AI / ML Engineering Execution
• Oversee development of: 
o Machine learning models (supervised / unsupervised)
o Generative AI and LLM based solutions
o Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines
o Model deployment and monitoring workflows
• Promote MLOps best practices including CI/CD, model versioning, monitoring, and retraining.
• Translate business problems into AI/ML technical solutions.
• Communicate progress, risks, and outcomes to technical and non technical stakeholders.

Required Qualifications
• Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Engineering, Data Science, or related field.
• 7–10 years of overall engineering experience with 3+ years in AI/ML engineering.
• 2+ years of people or technical team leadership experience.
• Strong hands-on experience with: 
o Python and ML frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch, scikit learn)
o Cloud platforms (Azure preferred)
o ML model deployment and product ionization
• Experience building and deploying LLM or GenAI solutions is strongly preferred.
• Solid understanding of data pipelines, APIs, and distributed systems.

Preferred Qualifications
• Experience with healthcare, payer, or regulated industries.
• Exposure to Responsible AI, model governance, and compliance reviews.
• Familiarity with vector databases, embeddings, and RAG architectures.
• Experience managing mixed onshore/offshore delivery teams.


If anyone interested, please share your resume at shivani@excelonsolutions.com.

Aditya Verma

Hiring for IT-Professionals (USA) || Senior Talent Acquisition Specialist

🚀 We’re Hiring: Senior AI Architect (Remote – USA)

We’re looking for a Senior AI Architect to lead the design and delivery of next-generation AI solutions in the healthcare domain. If you’re passionate about building scalable, production-grade AI systems and shaping enterprise AI strategy, this role is for you.

🔹 What We’re Looking For
• 10+ years of experience (5+ years in AI/ML architecture)
• Deep expertise in LLMs, GenAI, RAG, embeddings, and vector databases
• Hands-on experience with PyTorch / TensorFlow and tools like LangChain, LlamaIndex, or Semantic Kernel
• Strong cloud architecture experience (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
• Solid understanding of healthcare data (claims, EDI, clinical workflows)

🔹 What You’ll Do
Architecture & Design
• Lead end-to-end architecture for AI/ML and GenAI systems
• Design RAG pipelines, vector database strategies, and LLM orchestration flows
• Build multi-agent systems, tool-calling agents, and reasoning workflows
• Translate complex healthcare requirements into secure, scalable AI solutions
Data & Pipeline Engineering
• Architect event-driven, incremental data pipelines for healthcare data
• Oversee embeddings, feature pipelines, and data governance
MLOps & LLMOps
• Establish CI/CD pipelines for ML & LLM workloads
• Implement monitoring, evaluation, guardrails, and rollback strategies
• Ensure secure cloud deployment (AWS / Azure / GCP)

Leadership & Collaboration
• Provide technical leadership and guide engineering teams
• Partner with product, business, and clinical stakeholders
• Communicate architecture decisions clearly across audiences
Compliance & Responsible AI
• Ensure adherence to HIPAA and data privacy standards
• Implement responsible AI practices and model safety guardrails


📍 Location: Remote (USA)

📩 Apply Now: aditya.verma@imcsgroup.net

If you’re ready to architect impactful AI systems in healthcare, we’d love to connect.
